scripts.dev: concurrently -n admin,project -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix frontend-admin run dev" "npm --prefix frontend-project run dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n admin,project -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix frontend-admin run build" "npm --prefix frontend-project run build"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix frontend-admin install && npm --prefix frontend-project install
